# github: contribution: lookup doesn't show last week on Sunday

```bash
$ maintainer github contribution lookup /-2
 Day / Week                      #26                #27
------------------------- ------------------ -----------------
 Sunday                           5                  3
 Monday                           5                  6
 Tuesday                          4                  6
 Wednesday                        4                  6
 Thursday                         4                  6
 Friday                           4                  6
 Saturday                         2                  6
------------------------- ------------------ -----------------
 Contributions are on the range from 2022-06-26 to 2022-07-10
```

There is no 2022-07-10.
